TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Qwayux Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Qwayux a niyaro', 77 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 236 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 202 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 34 ko tamdaw. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *wajo~u~ux itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u *wajo~u~ux a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Qwayux Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Qwayux a niyaro', 77 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 236 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 202 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 34 ko tamdaw. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *wajo~u~ux itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u *wajo~u~ux a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
